title: Night Mode (Blue light filter)
description: Makes the screen orange like settings on phones and computers
body:
### Description Adds a customizable orange filter to the game environment (not the GUI or items, only things in the world like blocks and mobs). This setting can be changed using a slider found in **Accessibility Settings**. The filter is only active when graphics are set to **Fabulous!** and the slider is **above 0%**. The slider replaces the Enchantment Glint strength, and the value will stay when disabling or enabling the pack. The glint strength is set to its default (75%) while the pack is active. ### Versions Supports Minecraft **Java Edition 1.21.5**. Other versions may work. ### Compatibility Incompatible with packs that edit the transparency post-effect shader (including to display custom shaders) or some other specific shaders and a custom one. Incompatible with any other use of the glint strength slider in accessibility settings, including modifying the name in the en_us lang file. ### Disclaimer Blue light filters may not actually have a positive effect, according to some studies. It is advisable to do your own research if you want to know what is best. This project was mainly intended as practice making shaders. It is up to the user whether or not they feel there is a benefit to using this pack.
![The setting in accessibility settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a90b35a6371e8c4204fabf1ea7f8f18bf9cffed3.png) ### Patreon Join my new Patreon to support my projects!
